artifact.summary: One admitted DeepSeek V4 Pro grounded long-context live pilot completed one non-streaming model call on the approved second-source excerpt. The output hit the 1600-token output cap (finish_reason=length) and the as-emitted JSON did not parse; all five contract sections were emitted and truncation landed inside the final string of the last method-failure note, so review used a local tail repair. Strict line-range review found zero of four emitted line ranges support-valid and supplied corrected locators after the fact.

source_metadata.source_scope: operator-approved second-source excerpt from the local pharm box-trades transcript, same as chunked_source_grounding pilots 004-006

cost_metadata.pricing_basis: Conservative metadata-safe upper bound of $1 per million total tokens for budget containment; not billing authority.

model_output_metadata.parse_error: unterminated string: output ended at the 1600-token cap inside the final method-failure-note description

local_postprocessing_metadata.offsets_and_hashes_computed_only_for: reviewer-corrected line ranges accepted during the strict line-range review, not for the rejected model-emitted ranges

failure_or_limitation_notes: This record captures one admitted DeepSeek V4 Pro grounded long-context call only.

The grounded contract did not fit the 1600-token output cap: finish_reason=length and the as-emitted JSON did not parse, echoing the chunked pilot 001 contract-size failure as anticipated in the run admission update.

All five contract sections were emitted before truncation; the cut landed inside the final string of the second method-failure note, so substantive tables were complete and reviewable through a local tail repair.
Strict line-range review found zero of four emitted line ranges support-valid; corrected locators were supplied by the reviewer after the fact.

Cap pressure is a confound for the locator-quality result: the model was emitting against a hard output ceiling, so locator degradation cannot be fully attributed to the abstraction workload without a cap-relieved repeat.
Method quality, trading correctness, strategy value, product readiness, and source-truth authority were not evaluated by this boundary record.
Full output text remains in ignored local trace storage and is not a committed authority surface.
payload.boundary_disclaimer: This is a proposal-only live LLM pilot record, not validation, product evidence, strategy evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, or architecture.
